hero.label: SWE · AVAILABLE MAR 2026
hero.description: Building production systems at the intersection of real-time infrastructure and autonomous AI agents. Deploys to production.

about.title: I build things that run at scale.
paragraphs: Computer Engineering student graduating May 2026 from Navi Mumbai. Currently leading Flutter development at Kstars Technology - Clean Architecture, SOLID, multi-platform. Before that, Redis pub/sub queues, distributed job systems, and OCR pipelines at DevionX.

My work sits at the intersection of real-time communication and autonomous agents. I've shipped a WebRTC platform to users, built AI agents that manage on-chain DeFi portfolios, and explored Model Context Protocol for next-gen AI infrastructure - all while the semester's still running.
9.0 CGPA, Honours in Blockchain. 2 hackathon wins. I build because I'm curious.

items.tech: Flutter · Clean Architecture · SOLID · React · PWA
highlights: Leading multi-platform Flutter app with Clean Architecture and SOLID principles across iOS and Android.
Optimized React web app performance -achieved 20% reduction in load time.
Built and shipped PWA version, improving accessibility.

items.tech: Redis · BullMQ · Gemini API · OCR · Node.js
highlights: Built real-time stock alert service using Redis pub/sub, BullMQ job queues, and Gemini API.
Developed multi-vendor e-commerce platform with modular architecture.
Implemented OCR-based Aadhaar masking system for secure processing.
Collaborated on SaaS dashboards for internal tools.

philosophy.quote: Engineering is the art of making the complex feel inevitable.

principles.title: Systems Over Symptoms
principles.text: Quick fixes create technical debt. I focus on building resilient pipelines and architectures that prevent problems rather than treating them after they appear.

principles.title: Latency is the Enemy
principles.text: Whether it's WebRTC peer connections or AI agent thought loops, sub-100ms response times aren't a luxury—they are the baseline for immersive experiences.

principles.title: Autonomous by Default
principles.text: Using tools like LangChain and MCP isn't about slapping an LLM wrapper on an API. It's about orchestration, dynamic context handling, and building tools that reason.

contact.title: Let's build something.
contact.subtitle: I'm open to roles, ideas, and interesting technical conversations.
